Hi, I'm Asifa Asif

BS-IT Student @ Bahria University | Aspiring Software Developer

I've just wrapped up my second semester of Bachelor's in Information Technology at Bahria University, Karachi Campus, and I'm gearing up to start my third. I love programming and solving problems — it's what pulled me toward tech in the first place. I'm building a strong foundation across SQL, Java, C++, and JavaScript, and enjoy exploring web development alongside my coursework. Still early in my journey, but every project teaches me something new, and I'm excited to keep growing into software development and beyond.
